targets.rawSql: SELECT kpi_value FROM flight_kpis WHERE kpi_name='active_flights'
SELECT ROUND(kpi_value,0) FROM flight_kpis WHERE kpi_name='avg_altitude_ft'
SELECT ROUND(kpi_value,0) FROM flight_kpis WHERE kpi_name='avg_speed_knots'
SELECT kpi_value FROM flight_kpis WHERE kpi_name='emergency_count'
SELECT hour_bucket AS time, flight_count, region FROM hourly_flight_trend ORDER BY hour_bucket
SELECT hour_bucket AS time, avg_altitude_ft, avg_speed_knots FROM hourly_flight_trend ORDER BY hour_bucket
SELECT region_label AS region, total_flights FROM region_summary ORDER BY total_flights DESC
SELECT operator, flight_count FROM top_operators ORDER BY rank LIMIT 10

SELECT hex, flight, registration, aircraft_type, ROUND(lat,4) AS lat, ROUND(lon,4) AS lon, altitude_ft, ROUND(gs_knots,0) AS speed_kts, track_deg, on_ground, emergency, region FROM flight_current ORDER BY last_seen DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT hex, flight, squawk, emergency, lat, lon, altitude_ft, region, last_seen FROM flight_current WHERE is_emergency = true ORDER BY last_seen DESC
